proposal.working_title: AI Labs vs AI Consulting Partner: A Mid-Market CFO's Buy-Build-Or-Partner Decision Framework
proposal.one_line_angle: For mid-market operators choosing between standing up an internal AI innovation lab or hiring a consulting partner, the right call is a function of failure cost across talent, governance, and time-to-revenue, not lab maturity.
outline_bullets: Why 'Should we build a lab?' is the wrong starting question for a $25M-$250M operator
The three failure modes that decide buy-build-or-partner: talent depth, governance debt, and time-to-revenue drag
A CFO's decision matrix: scoring internal lab versus partner against a 12-month payback target
